passes: AGENTS.md states the test/implementer separation rule, the passes-lock rule, the adversarial-test rule, and the mock-discipline rule
an independent reader can determine from the rule text which modules require independently authored behavior tests
pnpm test:mutants completes against the canvas document layer, canvas geometry, shared schemas, and gpu uniform resolvers, and reports a mutation score
every surviving mutant in scope is either killed by a new test or recorded with a rationale in the task note
property suites for undo/redo round-trip, patch reversibility, normalize idempotence, and resize-geometry invariants pass under pnpm test
each property test names the invariant it protects
a browser golden suite renders the full renderFull chain without mocking the orchestrator and compares pixels against checked-in goldens
a midtone-luminance probe records the current double-decode output and is marked as the reproduction test for the decode fix
CI runs the browser suite on ubuntu with SwiftShader
contract cases for concurrent active-conversation creation, idempotent createGeneration replay, and accept-edge preservation fail before the persistence fix and pass after it
an assets repository contract suite runs against both memory and pg-mem implementations
the pg-mem harness enforces the single-active-conversation invariant
